## SSRIs Overview

Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitors are first-line treatment for depression. Common SSRIs include sertraline, fluoxetine, and escitalopram.

## Side Effects

Common side effects include nausea, insomnia, and sexual dysfunction. Most improve within two weeks.
